ppeo:hasName.rdfs:label: Platform Name*
ppeo:hasName.rdfs:comment: Human-readable name of the platform (e.g., UAV model).

ppeo:hasDescription.rdfs:label: Platform Description
ppeo:hasDescription.rdfs:comment: Narrative description of the platform and its role.

ppeo:hasPlatformType.rdfs:label: Platform Type
ppeo:hasPlatformType.rdfs:comment: E.g., UAV, satellite, tractor, gantry, tripod, etc.

ppeo:hasAccessionNumber.rdfs:label: Platform accession number
ppeo:hasAccessionNumber.rdfs:comment: Catalog, registry, or inventory ID if applicable.

ppeo:isPartOf.rdfs:label: Part of Study
ppeo:isPartOf.rdfs:comment: Optional link to the parent Study by @id.

sosa:hosts.rdfs:label: Hosted Sensors
sosa:hosts.rdfs:comment: Sensors mounted on or otherwise hosted by this platform.

ppeo:hasPart.rdfs:label: Associated Files
ppeo:hasPart.rdfs:comment: Technical specs, calibration sheets, manuals, etc., that describe this platform.
